title: Salty Chewy Greek Sesame Flatbread
description: A savory, chewy flatbread packed with sesame butter and a flavorful temper, perfect for a Greekinspired brunch.
instructions: Dissolve yeast in warm water and let sit 5 minutes until frothy.
In a large bowl whisk flour with salt (for dough). Add yeast mixture, olive oil, sesame oil, and 10 g of sesame seeds. Knead 5–7 minutes until smooth.
Cover dough and let rise 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
Punch down, divide into four equal portions, and roll each into a 6″×6″ disc.
Brush tops lightly with water and sprinkle remaining 10 g sesame seeds. Let rest 10 minutes.
Preheat oven to 425 °F (220 °C). Place discs on parchment-lined sheet.
Bake 12–15 minutes until golden‑brown crust forms.
While flatbreads bake, whisk tahini, olive oil, lemon juice, and salt (for temper) until creamy and glossy.
Remove flatbreads from oven, brush each with sesame temper.
Slice into squares and serve warm.
